% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	{A\otimes A} && {A\otimes A\otimes A} \\
	& A \\
	{A\otimes A\otimes A} && {A\otimes A}
	\arrow["{\delta\otimes\operatorname{id}_{A}}", from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["\mu", from=1-1, to=2-2]
	\arrow["{\operatorname{id}_{A}\otimes\delta}"', from=1-1, to=3-1]
	\arrow["{ \operatorname{id}_{A}\otimes \mu}", from=1-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["\delta", from=2-2, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{ \mu \otimes  \operatorname{id}_{A}}"', from=3-1, to=3-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
